_comment: Slug → absolute cwd registry. Authoritative source for nf-dream normalize/backfill when filling metadata.cwd. Update this file to match the projects you actually have on disk. Slug = the value you use for metadata.project in canonical frontmatter.
_usage: Replace the example entries below with your real slugs and absolute paths. Keep one slug per project. Use the same slug as basename of the git repo for consistency.
